title: stachys scabrida
intro: Stachys scabrida, also known as prickly hedgenettle, is a plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and indigestion. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe and calm the digestive system, as well as provide relief from menstrual cramps and other health issues. Stachys scabrida can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine.
